title: Item updates to increment the Last Updated column
excerpt: I would like the ‘Last Updated’ column to be updated when users add ‘Updates’ to items so that we can track user activity.

posts.author: Max-Headroom (Max Headroom)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like the ‘Last Updated’ column to be updated when users add ‘Updates’ to items so that we can track user activity.

posts.author: jlambke (Joe Lambke)
posts.cookedHtml: Did anyone find a solution to tracking user activity when someone adds an update to the “item update”?

posts.author: Max-Headroom (Max Headroom)
posts.cookedHtml: I have yet to come across a solution and am still interested in having this resolved.
